title: Delighted+
description: The most popular add-ons to Farmers Delight all in one spot. New 70+ Delight mod update!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c43e9cedf29fc73e3a825b1b5d2ff8cec8f832fa.png)

### Use the 2.0 Delighted+ version if you want the best experince.
![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1318712716f68f249a1e3cf2fb7cff40bb04e24b.png)

- 🌽 70+ Farmers Delight Mods
- 🌽 Custom Loot
- 🌽 200+ New Recipies
- 🌽 Custom Biomes and Structures
- 🌴 4 Pre-Set shaders (Iris shaders)
- 🌴 Preformance mods
- 🌴 QoL Mods

## ⚠️ Warning
The farmers delight community is starting to die down, as it does less and less delight mods get released with every new minecraft update. This forces this project to slow down with new versions as I struggle to find a variety of new delight mods. I will always try to keep up with the new minecraft versions, however with very few delight mods left, expect less ccontent in each of this projects updates.
